name: Jesinoski v. Countrywide Home Loans, Inc.
question: Does the Truth in Lending Act allow a borrower to rescind a loan by notifying the creditor within the three-year time frame, even though a lawsuit has not yet been filed?
description: A case in which the Court ruled that the Truth in Lending Act allows a borrower to rescind a loan by notifying the creditor within the three-year time frame, even though a lawsuit has not yet been filed.
